nodes.name: Send Notification
nodes.notes: Placeholder delivery node, disabled by default. Replace this node with your actual notification channel: Telegram sendMessage, HTTP Request to a webhook, or any messaging integration supported by n8n. The notification payload (subject, body, recipients) is already prepared by the Prepare Notification node above.

nodes.name: Store in Database (Optional)
nodes.notes: Enable this node if you want to persist scheduling logs to a database
